business.name: KiwiQuote
business.tagline: A quick yarn that could save you heaps on your insurance.

seo.title: See if you could save on your life insurance
seo.description: A quick, friendly 5-minute call to see if you could be paying less for your life or medical insurance. No jargon, no pressure.

hero.headline: See if you could be paying less on your life insurance.
hero.subheadline: Pop in a few details and one of our team will give you a quick 5-minute call to check whether you could be getting a better deal. No jargon. No hard sell. Just a friendly chat.

reassurances.value: We call you, when it suits

check.headline: Let's see what we can do.
check.subheadline: Fill in your details and we'll be in touch for a quick, friendly chat. The more you tell us, the more useful the call.

miniList.value: No cost and no obligation, ever
We only call at a time you choose
Your details stay private and safe

questions.prompt: What are you mainly interested in?
questions.help: Pick whichever feels closest, you can chat the rest through on the call.
questions.options: Life insurance, Medical / health, Income protection, Not sure yet

questions.help: No wrong answer here, it just helps us help you.
A rough range is perfectly fine.

questions.prompt: When's a good time to call?
questions.help: We'll do our best to ring when it suits you.
questions.options: Morning, Afternoon, After 5pm, Any time's fine

check.successMessage: We've got your details. Someone from the team may give you a quick call to see if we can help. Keep an eye on your phone, talk soon!

how.headline: Three easy steps. That's the whole thing.
how.subheadline: We keep it simple, because insurance is confusing enough already. Here's exactly what happens after you fill in the form.

steps.title: Tell us a little
steps.desc: Answer a handful of quick questions so we understand your situation. No paperwork, no policy numbers to dig out.
steps.benefits: Just a few simple questions, No paperwork or policy numbers, Takes about 5 minutes

steps.title: We give you a call
steps.desc: One of our friendly team rings you, takes a quick look at what you've got, and chats through whether you could do better.
steps.benefits: We call at a time that suits you, A friendly look at your cover, No jargon, no hard sell

steps.title: You decide what's next
steps.desc: If it looks like you could save, a licensed adviser can take it from there. If not, no worries at all.
steps.benefits: See if you could be paying less, A licensed adviser only if it helps, Zero obligation, never locked in

how.note: the form and the first call are simply to understand your situation. We don't give financial advice over the form or the intro call. If it makes sense, a licensed financial adviser may follow up to talk things through properly.

list.question: Is this really free?
list.answer: Yes, completely. The check and the chat won't cost you a thing. We only get paid if you choose to go ahead with a better policy down the track, and even then it's the insurer who pays us, not you.

list.question: Will I get hassled with calls?
list.answer: Nope. We'll give you one friendly call at the time you picked. If it's not for you, that's totally fine and we'll leave it there.

list.question: Do I have to switch anything?
list.answer: Not at all. Plenty of people just want a second opinion to check they're not overpaying. You're in control the whole way through.

list.question: Is my information safe?
list.answer: Yes. Your details are only used to give you a call about your insurance, and they're kept private and secure. We never sell your information.

footer.blurb: Helping everyday Kiwis check they're getting a fair deal on their insurance.
footer.legal: KiwiQuote helps connect you with licensed financial advisers. We don't provide financial advice through this website or our intro call. Any advice is provided by a licensed financial adviser, and a copy of their disclosure information is available on request.
